entries.content: Windows CI cannot reliably taskkill a spawned Codex child process by PID alone (`taskkill /PID <pid> /T /F` fails with 'Invalid argument/option'); this is a known host-environment gap in tests/runtime.test.mjs's cancel/session-end tests, not a regression to chase.
New test files must be named `tests/<name>.test.mjs` and placed directly under tests/ (no subdirectories) or `npm test`'s glob (`node --test tests/*.test.mjs`) will silently skip them.
